---
title: "TRSE units: AMSTRADCPC"
description: Bundled Turbo Rascal unit files (.tru) shipped with TRSE

# AMSTRADCPC

These paths are relative to `units/AMSTRADCPC/` in the TRSE tree. Reference a unit with `@use "<path>"` (no `.tru` extension).

## Files

- `cpcfloat`
- `crtc`
- `input`
- `memory`
- `music`
- `sound`
- `text/txt`
- `text`
- `unittests/common`
